purpose: Driver should detect when patch round N produces the same set of failing tests + identical diff fingerprint as round N-1. Today the harness runs all 3 patch rounds + cognitive recovery = ~15 min wasted on identical-shape failures. With L4.B plateau detector, abort after round 2 if progress score shows oscillation or identical failures.
anti_pattern_being_tested: Run all 3 retry rounds even when round 1 and 2 produced identical failure shape + identical diff. Saves 5 min wall-clock per parked module.
